summary: Frontend testing of Go Live GPS-based nearby spots workflow in PhotographerSessionsManager. All 10 requested features verified working correctly. The Go Live button requests GPS location permission, displays 'Nearby Surf Spots' list instead of dropdown, shows 'GPS Active' badge when location is granted, spots are sorted by distance (closest first), each spot shows name/region/distance in miles, clicking a spot selects it with visual highlight, shows 'Not at the spot yet' warning with distance for far spots, manual confirmation option appears for spots outside 0.2 mile range, warning text about negative reviews/suspension shows for manual override, and 'Next: Add Conditions' button is disabled until location is verified or manually confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: GPS-based nearby spots implementation correctly matches DutyStationDrawer.js pattern
startSequentialGoLive() properly requests GPS permission before showing modal
fetchNearbySpots() calls /api/surf-spots/nearby endpoint with correct parameters
Spots are displayed in scrollable list sorted by distance (closest first)
Each spot button has data-testid='nearby-spot-{id}' for testing
Location verification shows clear distance status with 0.2 mile threshold
Manual confirmation option with proper warning text about consequences
Next button disabled state correctly tied to canProceed (isWithinRange || manualConfirm)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Go Live GPS-based nearby spots workflow fully tested. Key flows: 1) Go Live button -> GPS permission request -> Go Live Modal with nearby spots list, 2) Spots sorted by distance with name/region/distance display, 3) Spot selection shows distance verification status, 4) Manual confirm option for spots outside 0.2 mile range with warning text, 5) Next button disabled until location verified or manually confirmed. Geolocation mocking to San Diego area (lat: 32.7157, lng: -117.1611) required for testing.

go_live_requests_gps.description: Go Live button triggers startSequentialGoLive() which requests GPS location permission

nearby_spots_list_instead_of_dropdown.description: Go Live Modal displays 'Nearby Surf Spots' list with scrollable spot buttons instead of dropdown

gps_active_badge.description: GPS Active badge with Target icon shows when location is granted

spots_sorted_by_distance.description: Nearby spots are sorted by distance (closest first) - Sunset Cliffs 5.5mi, Ocean Beach SD 7.1mi, Mission Beach 7.5mi, Pacific Beach 8.9mi

spot_shows_name_region_distance.description: Each spot shows name (e.g., 'Sunset Cliffs'), region (e.g., 'San Diego'), and distance in miles (e.g., '5.5 mi')

spot_selection_visual_highlight.description: Clicking a spot selects it with visual highlight (border-2 class with blue/green color based on range)

not_at_spot_warning.description: After selecting a spot far away, shows 'Not at the spot yet' warning with distance (e.g., 'You're 5.52 miles away (need to be within 0.2 miles)')

manual_confirm_option.description: Manual confirmation option appears for spots outside 0.2 mile range with 'GPS not accurate?' section and 'I confirm I'm at this spot' button

warning_text_negative_reviews.description: Warning text shows: 'Going live when not at the spot may result in negative reviews, selling suspension, or account action'

next_button_disabled_until_verified.description: 'Next: Add Conditions' button (data-testid='go-live-next-btn') is disabled until location is verified (within 0.2 miles) OR manually confirmed

go_live_modal.title: Go Live - Select Location
elements: Current session rates summary ($25 buy-in, 3 photos included, Tiered pricing)
Location verification status (within range or not at spot warning)
Manual confirm section with warning text
Cancel and Next: Add Conditions buttons

spot_item.name: Spot name (e.g., Sunset Cliffs)
spot_item.in_range_badge: Shows 'In Range' badge if within 0.2 miles

location_verification.within_range: Green box with 'You're at the spot!' message
location_verification.not_at_spot: Amber box with 'Not at the spot yet' warning and distance
location_verification.manual_confirm: Gray box with 'GPS not accurate?' section and confirm button

data_testid_attributes_verified: go-live-btn - Go Live button on sessions page
nearby-spot-{id} - Each spot in the nearby spots list
